message:
feat(sync): add ContendedMutex with feature-gated lock metrics (bd-1pfhx)

Introduces ContendedMutex, a std::sync::Mutex wrapper that optionally
tracks contention metrics (wait_ns, hold_ns, contentions, acquisitions,
max_wait_ns, max_hold_ns) behind the `lock-metrics` feature flag.
Zero-cost when disabled. Designed for before/after comparison during
RuntimeState sharding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -30,6 +30,9 @@ trace-compression = ["dep:lz4_flex"]
 debug-server = []
 # Enable TOML config file loading for RuntimeBuilder.
 config-file = ["dep:toml"]
+# Enable lock contention metrics for ContendedMutex (wait/hold time tracking).
+# Zero cost when disabled. Used for sharding before/after comparison.
+lock-metrics = []
 # Enable io_uring reactor for Linux modern async I/O (requires kernel 5.1+).
 io-uring = ["dep:io-uring"]
 # Enable TLS support via rustls
